title: SIENON Flower Bouquet Building Set-1064 PCS 12 Kinds of Flowers Botanical Collection, Building Blocks Flower Brick Toy Craft Project for Home Room Décor Valentines’ Day Christmas Birthday
features: 【12 Unique Flower Bouquet Building Kit-No Vase】-Do you want some never-fade flowers? The beautiful building blocks flower bouquet will give you amazing feeling! The flower building toy features vibrant colors and vivid flower shapes and petals stacked layer by layer, inspired by real flowers including Rose, Lily, Michelia, White Clover, Crocus Sativus, Camellia, Carnation, Jasmine, Tulip, Lavender, Chrysanthemun, Sunflower.

【DIY Creative Craft Kit-Beautiful Home Décor】-The gorgeous flower clusters building set comes with detailed colorful step by step instruction manual. You can bloom your imagination to spell out your favorite patterns to build a romantic flower bouquet. It can be used to home, office and room decoration (not including vases), make elegant and fresh ornament for home, adding a warm atmosphere to Home!

【Premium Quality Material & Adjustable Size】- The building blocks kit has 1001pcs brick tiles, made of child-friendly high quality ABS plastic. All pass ASTM & CPSIA TEST. The package size 12inch(L) x 2.8inch(W) x 9inch(H). You can freely DIY the flower shape and stem height, flexible to adapt to the height of the vases.

【Super Gift Idea】- The botanical collection is a perfect gift for any fan of DIY arts and crafts, best gift for birthday party, Christmas, new year, Mother’s Day, Father’s Day, Valentine’s Day, Thanksgiving Day and other holiday gifts. It is also suitable for school prizes, school projects etc. Exquisite packaging for flower plant bouquet building toys.

【No-Worry Service】- We strongly stand behind each item it designs and sells. We believe you will love our products as much as we do! But if for some reasons you don’t satisfy, we will full refund. And any problems, please do not hesitate to contact us. For more purchase, please visit our store SIENON.
